message:
I've been thinking about blackouts lately—not in a doom way, just in a "wouldn't it be nice to handle one smoothly" kind of way. The Red Cross has a solid guide that breaks down the practical stuff (like what to do with your fridge, how to stay cool, keeping meds safe) without being dramatic about it. Honestly, knowing a few basics takes a lot of the stress out of losing power.

What's your go-to during an outage—board games, books, or just an excuse for an early bedtime?
